Experience

Backend Developer at Subcode

11/2025 - 03/2026
  • Worked on a multi-tenant system and implemented updates to improve scalability and maintainability.
  • Optimized database queries and backend operations, resulting in improved system performance.
  • Contributed to a booking system by adding new features such as transportation booking and special offers.
  • Developed and managed admin functionalities using Filament.
  • Built and tested RESTful APIs using Postman to ensure reliability and smooth integration.

Backend Developer at Qeyam

04/2025 - 10/2025
  • Developed and maintained backend services for a comprehensive ERP system using Laravel.
  • Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and tested endpoints using Postman.
  • Refactored controllers and implemented Form Request validation for better performance and cleaner code.
  • Built and integrated HR modules including: employee shifts, shift assignments, attendance tracking, and penalty management.
  • Added a Loyalty Points module to improve customer retention features.
  • Implemented a Discount Codes system to support promotions and sales operations.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth ERP integration.
